hero.title: QiAlly

hero.description: Streamlining business operations through intelligent automation, custom development, and strategic technology implementation. Your partner in digital transformation.
hero.tagline: Systems that turn chaos into clarity.

about.title: About QiAlly
about.description: We specialize in transforming business operations through intelligent automation, custom development, and strategic technology implementation. Our mission is to streamline your workflow and maximize efficiency.

services.title: Business Process Automation
services.description: Streamline your operations with intelligent automation solutions that reduce manual work and increase efficiency.
services.longDescription: Transform repetitive tasks into automated workflows. We design, implement, and optimize automation solutions that free your team to focus on high-value work.

services.title: Custom Web Development
services.description: Build scalable web applications tailored to your business needs with modern technologies.
services.longDescription: From client portals to internal tools, we build web applications that solve real business problems. Modern, fast, and maintainable.

services.title: Knowledge Management Systems
services.description: Organize and leverage your business knowledge with AI-powered RAG systems and intelligent search.
services.longDescription: Turn your scattered knowledge into an organized, searchable asset. AI-powered search and retrieval makes finding information instant.

services.title: Client Portal Development
services.description: Create secure, user-friendly portals that enhance client experience and streamline communication.
services.longDescription: Give your clients a branded, secure space to collaborate, share documents, and track progress. Improve client satisfaction and reduce admin overhead.

portfolio.title: BuiltByRays CFO Operations
portfolio.description: Complete CFO operations system with automated financial reporting, client management, and document processing.
portfolio.results: Streamlined financial processes, reduced reporting time by 70%

portfolio.title: Innovahire HR Platform
portfolio.description: Comprehensive HR management system with applicant tracking, employee onboarding, and performance management.
portfolio.results: Improved hiring efficiency, reduced time-to-hire by 50%

portfolio.title: Rosa Lucas Esteban Legal Practice
portfolio.description: Digital transformation for legal practice with case management, client portal, and document automation.
portfolio.results: Automated document processing, improved case management efficiency

faq.question: What's included in ongoing support?
faq.answer: All projects include 30 days of post-launch support. After that, we offer monthly support packages starting at $500/month.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to issues?
faq.answer: We respond to all support requests within 4 business hours. Critical issues are addressed immediately.

faq.question: Do you offer training?
faq.answer: Yes! Every project includes training sessions and documentation. Additional training is available at $150/hour.

faq.question: Can you help with maintenance and updates?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer monthly maintenance packages that include updates, monitoring, and improvements.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Ready to transform your business operations? Let's discuss your project and how we can help streamline your workflow.

form.title: Start Your Project
form.description: Tell us about your business needs and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
